violations.text: The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the spray bottles was exceeding 200ppm. The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. 3-bay sink was corrected to 100ppm at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025

All food in walk-in cooler was observed held at 43 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Ambient of walk-in cooler was observed at 40 DF. PIC lowered the walk-in cooler temperature to 38 DF at the time of inspection. Establishment is to monitor the internal temperature of the food in walk-in cooler. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back of kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025

The cutting boards in the prep units are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025
Prep unit #1 gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025

At the time of inspection, when the sanitizer bay of the 3-bay sink was draining, water was being backed up into the wash bay of the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to call service for 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025

The dumpster and grease bin outside is located on grass. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Per PIC, establishment is planning on putting in a cement platform. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the ware-washing area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024
The hand-washing sink in the ware-washing area was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024
Single service items are being stored on the floor in the kitchen. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024
Prep Unit (1 & 2) door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the hoods have an accumulation of dust, dirt, grease and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. 1. Vents 2. Fans 3. Handwash sink (faucet) 4. Fryer (sides) 5. Flat top (underneath) 6. Shelving throughout 7. Bread drawer New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024
Toilet rooms were observed with trash and debris. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024

The dumpster outside is located on grass. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024
Observed spices being stored in a closet without proper ceiling, exposed installation and wires. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024
